snippets.name: cli-argparse-basic
snippets.code:
import argparse

parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='My CLI App')
parser.add_argument('input', help='Input file')
parser.add_argument('-v', '--verbose', action='store_true')
parser.add_argument('-o', '--output', default='output.txt')
args = parser.parse_args()

snippets.name: cli-subcommands
snippets.code:
import argparse

parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
subparsers = parser.add_subparsers()

init_parser = subparsers.add_parser('init')
init_parser.add_argument('name')

run_parser = subparsers.add_parser('run')
run_parser.add_argument('--watch', action='store_true')

snippets.name: cli-env-config
snippets.code:
import os
from pathlib import Path

def get_config():
    env = os.getenv('APP_ENV', 'development')
    config_dir = Path(__file__).parent / 'config'
    config_file = config_dir / f'{env}.json'
    return json.loads(config_file.read_text())

snippets.name: flet-page
snippets.description: Flet page setup with G360 theme
snippets.code:
import flet as ft

def main(page: ft.Page):
    page.title = 'G360 App'
    page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.DARK
    page.bgcolor = '#0b1220'
    page.padding = 20
    page.add(ft.Text('G360 Desktop App', size=24, color='#00d084'))

snippets.name: flet-dialog
snippets.code:
def show_dialog(page, title, content):
    dialog = ft.AlertDialog(
        title=ft.Text(title, color='#00d084'),
        content=ft.Container(content=content, padding=20),
        actions=[
            ft.TextButton('Cancelar', on_click=lambda _: page.close_dialog()),
            ft.ElevatedButton('Aceptar', bgcolor='#00d084', color='#0b1220'),
        ]
    )
    page.dialog = dialog
    dialog.open = True
    page.update()
